_comment: Real-shape mcp-proxy /call response for openagentic_azure.azure_advisor_recommendations when the subscription has zero Cost recommendations (either no findings, or subscription is small/young enough that Advisor hasn't generated any). success:true with count:0 and an empty recommendations array. Matches oap-azure-mcp src/server.py azure_advisor_recommendations success path with an empty AdvisorManagementClient.recommendations.list() iterator.
